title: AN ACT DECLARING APRIL FIFTEEN OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TALISAY, NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, IN HONOR OF THE LATE GENERAL ANECITO LACSON

chunks.text:
H. No. 11727 / 87 OG No. 45, 6843 (Nov. 11, 1991)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7153, August 30, 1991 ]

AN ACT DECLARING APRIL FIFTEEN OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TALISAY, NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, IN HONOR OF THE LATE GENERAL ANECITO LACSON

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. April Fifteen of every year is hereby declared a special working holiday in the Municipality of Talisay, Province of Negros Occidental, in honor of the late General Anecito Lacson.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

JOVITO R. SALONGA

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on March 26, 1990 and May 16, 1991, respectively.

EDWIN P. ACOBA

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: August 30, 1991

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
